title: NetworkMode
description: Network connectivity requirements for a Deployment Profile

ONLINE.description: Full network connectivity required for all operations
ONLINE.use_case: Airport gates with guaranteed connectivity, web portals

OFFLINE.description: Operates without network; uses cached trust material and grace periods
OFFLINE.use_case: Remote border checkpoints, aircraft, venues with intermittent connectivity

HYBRID.description: Best-effort connectivity; falls back to cached material when offline
HYBRID.trust_check: Live where available, cached on failure
HYBRID.revocation: Live preferred; cached with retry on failure
